Notes: Game 4 of the 2008 Radisson Hotel Roseville Holiday Classic.
CU's Candace Olstad reaches 1,000 career points with career-high 27 points
CU's Kali Olstad career-high 20 points. Both Olstads named All-Tournament
VCSU Mandy Johnson and Lynn Madeleine Doyle and WSU Anna Wurtz (MVP) all-trny
Game.Officials: Mary Toberman,  Pat Rock,  MJ Wagenson
